ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "bicycles" INTEGER /* Number of bicycles */,
  "motorcycle" INTEGER /* Number of motorcycles */,
  "cars_light_goods" INTEGER /* Number of cars and light goods */,
  "buses" INTEGER /* Number of buses */,
  "single_unit_heavy" INTEGER /* Number of single unit heavy vehicles */,
  "multi_unit_heavy" INTEGER /* Number of multi unit heavy vehicles */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lane where the data was collected */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of traffic flow */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles in the lane */,
  "congestion_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the level of congestion */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident if one was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., camera, inductive loop, radar) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., congestion, accident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that detected the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the event */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Time when the event was resolved */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
